CustomField.description: Timestamp stamped by NEPA_CE_Screener immediately before it writes screening results. NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer reads this to skip re-firing when nepa_review_type__c was changed by the screener rather than by a human. Guards against the CE Screener → Risk Scorer → CE Screener recursion chain.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Populated automatically by the CE Screener. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Screener Last Run
